zh.lifeSummary: Anna Hurlburt於1752年出生在美國康乃狄克州。她於1784年6月9日與William Tryon在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1815年在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德法明頓享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna Hurlburt于1752年出生在美国康涅狄格州。她于1784年6月9日与William Tryon在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1815年在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hurlburt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hurlbut
meanings: English: nickname from a medieval game called hurlebatte, which took its name from ‘short battes of a cubit long and a halfe, with pykes of yron, and were tied to a line, that when they were throwne, one might plucke them again’ (1565–73). Compare ‘Pleying at The two hande swerd, at swerd and bokelere, and at two pyked staf, at The hurlebatte’ (about 1450 in MED).

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: British Forces Capture Fort Griswold
historicEvents.description: The capture of Fort Griswold was the final act of treason that Benedict Arnold committed. This would be a British victory. On the American side 85 were killed, 35 wounded and paroled, 28 taken prisoner, 13 escaped, and 1 twelve year old was captured and released.
historicEvents.urlTitle: History of the Battle of Groton and The Burning of New London

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.

historicEvents.title: Brass is Discovered
historicEvents.description: "In 1802, brass was identified in Waterbury, Connecticut. This gave the city the nickname ""The Brass City."" Brass dominated the city and helped to create the city. The motto of the city is Quid Aere Perennius, which means What is more lasting than brass? in Latin."
historicEvents.urlTitle: Connecticut History.Org- Birth of the Brass Valley

historicEvents.description: France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

en.lifeSummary: Anna Hurlburt was born in 1752, in Connecticut, United States. She married William Tryon on 9 June 1784, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1815, in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 63.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Hurlburtは1752年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州で生まれた。1784年6月9日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでWilliam Tryonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1815年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードファルミントンで63歳で死去した。

ko.Glastonbury, Hartford, Connecticut, Unit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 글라스토버이
ko.lifeSummary: Anna Hurlburt(은)는 1752년 미국 코네티컷 주에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1784년 6월 9일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 William Tryon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1815년 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 패밍턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Hurlburt родилась в 1752 г. в местности Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Tryon 9 июня 1784 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1815 г. в местности фармингтон, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 63 лет.
